purpose: Regression fixtures for Gate 2 of the Philippines Building Code Evidence Auditor V2. These cases lock one of exactly four earthquake evidence lanes after a place is confirmed and before any evidence search begins.
fixture_notice: All sample places and source links in this file are workflow fixtures. They are not public evidence about real buildings.
required_menu_labels: OBO structural permit or review evidence
Latest clearance after damage or tag

cases.description: After the exact place is confirmed, V2 asks the four-option earthquake menu and keeps evidence search blocked.

scope_menu.label: NSCP / seismic design evidence
OBO structural permit or review evidence
Latest post-earthquake tag / status
Latest clearance after damage or tag

scope_confirmation.user_facing_prompt: For KCC Mall of GenSan, which earthquake evidence search should run? 1. NSCP / seismic design evidence 2. OBO structural permit or review evidence 3. Latest post-earthquake tag / status 4. Latest clearance after damage or tag
clarifying_questions: For KCC Mall of GenSan, which earthquake evidence search should run: 1. NSCP / seismic design evidence, 2. OBO structural permit or review evidence, 3. Latest post-earthquake tag / status, or 4. Latest clearance after damage or tag?

cases.description: A numeric menu answer locks NSCP/seismic design evidence as the scope.

scope_menu.label: NSCP / seismic design evidence
OBO structural permit or review evidence
Latest post-earthquake tag / status
Latest clearance after damage or tag

locked_scope.label: NSCP / seismic design evidence
locked_scope.output_intent: Find target-specific public evidence that names NSCP, seismic design, structural calculations, or signed/sealed engineering review for the confirmed place.

scope_confirmation.user_facing_prompt: Got it. I will search only for public NSCP / seismic design evidence for KCC Mall of GenSan. If no target-specific public evidence is found, the answer is no public evidence found, not a safety or compliance conclusion.

cases.description: A label answer locks OBO structural permit or review evidence as the scope.

scope_menu.label: NSCP / seismic design evidence
OBO structural permit or review evidence
Latest post-earthquake tag / status
Latest clearance after damage or tag

locked_scope.label: OBO structural permit or review evidence
locked_scope.output_intent: Find target-specific public OBO or Building Official structural permit, plan review, correction, evaluation, inspection, or related record evidence.

scope_confirmation.user_facing_prompt: Got it. I will search only for public OBO structural permit or review evidence for SM City General Santos. If no target-specific public evidence is found, the answer is no public evidence found, not a conclusion that no review or permit exists.

cases.description: A natural-language answer locks latest post-earthquake tag or status as the scope.

user_intake.raw_user_scope_request: latest red or yellow tag after the quake

scope_menu.label: NSCP / seismic design evidence

locked_scope.label: Latest post-earthquake tag / status
locked_scope.output_intent: Find the latest target-specific public official tag, inspection status, occupancy restriction, or post-earthquake status statement.

scope_confirmation.user_facing_prompt: Got it. I will search only for the latest post-earthquake tag / status for RD Plaza Building. If no target-specific public answer is found, the answer is no public answer found, not no tag or cleared.

cases.description: A natural-language answer locks latest clearance after damage or tag as the scope.

user_intake.raw_user_scope_request: was there an official clearance after the yellow tag

locked_scope.label: Latest clearance after damage or tag
locked_scope.output_intent: Find target-specific public official clearance, lifting, reoccupancy, repair-completion acceptance, or signed/sealed stability evidence after damage or tag context.

scope_confirmation.user_facing_prompt: Got it. I will search only for latest clearance after damage or tag for Gaisano Mall of GenSan. If no target-specific public answer is found, the answer is no public answer found, not cleared.

cases.description: A vague earthquake safety question is not accepted as a locked evidence lane until the user chooses one of the four searches.
